info.name: View the List of Dtcs for Specific vehicleId

params.name: vehicleId
params.description: The vehicle identifier of the vehicle to read from.

params.name: ecuId
params.description: Return DTCs from this ECU id only. Default: Return DTCs from all ECUs.

params.name: dtcStatus
params.description: Returns DTCs with this statuses only. Default: Return DTCs with all statuses.

items.docs: This API creates a readout of DTCs for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the DTC readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!

info.name: View the List of Dtc Snapshot for Specific vehicleId

params.name: vehicleId
params.description: The vehicle identifier of the vehicle to read from

params.name: ecuId
params.description: The id of the ECU to read from

params.name: dtcId
params.description: The id of the DTC associated with the snapshot

items.docs: This API creates a readout of a DTC snapshot from one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the DTC snapshot readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!

info.name: View the List of Ecu for Specific vehicleId

params.name: vehicleId
params.description: The vehicle identifier of the vehicle to read from

params.name: ecuId
params.description: Return this ECU id only. Default: Return all ECUs.

items.docs: This API creates a readout of ECUs for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the ECU readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!

params.name: vehicleId
params.description: vehicleId of the resources to be viewed

items.docs: This API creates a readout of available resources to the accessing party for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the resource readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!
